description: Draft of an account for shipping flax, by Nahray b. Nissim and his partners. Around 1059. The account contains details about the purchase expenses, for about 1,200 kg of flax, and the expenses for their shipment, probably to Alexandria. The writer might be Abu Ali ha-Kohen (Nahray’s relative). (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #839) VMR
tags: draft, flax, trade, Nahray B. Nissim
description_he: טיוטת חשבון משלוח פשתן של נהראי בן ניסים ושותפיו, כ-1059, על הוצאות רכישה ומשלוח כ-1,200 ק"ג פשתן
